title: Drug-class vocabulary term
description: A pharmacological drug CLASS (never an individual drug). vocabularies/drug_classes.yaml is a list of these. It is the fixed taxonomy the Herb-Drug Interaction Checker (Prompt 1) selects from, and the target of a plant's drug_class_interactions[]. The herb->class->severity model is deliberate: the public tool shows class labels only, never brand or generic drug names.

id.description: Stable slug, e.g. anticoagulants-antiplatelets, antidepressants-ssri, cyp3a4-substrates.

label.description: Display label shown in the tool, e.g. 'Anticoagulants / antiplatelets'.

consumer_description.description: Plain-English description a layperson understands, e.g. 'medicines that reduce blood clotting'. Safe to display; contains NO individual drug names.

category.description: Broad grouping, e.g. cardiovascular, metabolic, psychiatric, cns, immune, endocrine, pharmacokinetic.

examples.description: EDITOR-FACING ONLY generic drug names in this class (used to draft/verify records). NEVER emitted to the public build output.

synonyms.description: Alternate names a user or editor might type, for search.
